/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/app/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/app/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/core/bridge_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/device/device_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/device/serial_port.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/net/network_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/net/tcp_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/net/udp_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tdi_reader.dir/src/protocol/crsf_parser.cpp.o -o tdi_reader
